notes: v333 — THE LOADING BOX NO LONGER JUMPS AROUND. You spotted the setup/loading info box enlarging then shrinking while data loads, which pushed the DATA and SETTINGS menus below it up and down and made them hard to tap. It was the “🐌 the free data proxy is running slow” notice: it was being wiped and re-added every time the progress line refreshed (a few times a second), so the whole box grew and shrank on repeat. Now that notice sits in its own spot that the progress updates don't touch — it shows once and stays put — and the box is set so it only ever grows while loading, never shrinks. The menus below hold still now. ALSO RECENT — v332 — FASTER: GRADING EVERY SIGNAL NO LONGER FREEZES THE APP. Opening your 📋 report card (and the bot's first daily scan) used to re-grade every flag across the whole market in one burst — long enough to look frozen on a phone. It now runs in tiny background slices and pre-computes the moment your data loads, so the card and the bot open instantly. None of the grading numbers changed. ALSO RECENT — v331 — ANNOUNCEMENTS NO LONGER GET STUCK ON “NONE”. When a free data relay briefly errored, the app used to remember it as “no announcements” for the day. Now a bad relay response is ignored (it tries another, or shows “couldn't reach” and recovers) instead of caching a fake “none”, and the 🤖 AI deep-dive now reads the share's real recent ASX announcements. ALSO RECENT — v330 — fixed the explanation pop-up hiding behind the report card. v329 — in training mode, hover anything on the report card to learn it. v328 — fixed a freeze when opening the bot settings. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
